title: デビュー戦の後に・めざすは日本一！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! I made it all the way to the end of my
debut race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It hasn't really hit me yet. I'm still in a bit of a
daze.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Anyhow! This means our journey towards the
Twinkle Series has really begun!

Special Week manages to get through her debut
and returns to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've achieved our first goal and made
a successful debut, we should be deciding on our
next race, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And now that we have to decide, I want you to
know there's a race that I've always wanted to run
in!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! A once-in-a-lifetime race that only classic
year racers can take part in—one that determines
the best of the generation!
choice_data_list: Are you saying what I think you're saying?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanna race in the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna become the best in Japan, so I need to
grab that Derby Umamusume title!

She's right. This race is basically a requirement for
any Umamusume aspiring to be number one.

What's more, the news of Spe becoming a Derby
Umamusume would reach all the way to her
mother in Hokkaido for sure!
choice_data_list:
All right! Our next objective is the Japanese
Derby!

All right! Our next objective is the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer!

Our goal is set, but Special Week doesn't have
enough experience to challenge the Derby yet.

It would be wiser to run in a fairly popular race
first. Which is why...
choice_data_list: Let's start with the Kisaragi Sho!
Let's start with the Kisaragi Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a G3?! A graded race... Th-that's a lotta
pressure...
choice_data_list: It'll give you some great experience.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...I guess I do need experience—especially if we're
aiming for the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! I'll run in the Kisaragi Sho to learn
what a real race feels like!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Time to get started on my path to the
Derby!
